message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Frauen in der DDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10946","justification":"Survey on women in the GDR focusing on employment, family roles, and gender-specific attitudes in 1984, directly addressing gender roles in the GDR during the 1980s."},{"title":"Frauen in der DDR 1986","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10947","justification":"Follow-up survey on women in the GDR from 1986 including questions on work, family, emancipation, and role expectations, thus capturing gender roles in the late GDR period."},{"title":"Einstellungen der Bevölkerung der DDR zu Familie und Geschlechterrollen 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10948","justification":"Study of attitudes among GDR citizens toward family, partnership, and division of labor between men and women in 1988, explicitly addressing gender roles."},{"title":"Berufstätigkeit von Frauen in der DDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10949","justification":"Dataset on female employment in the GDR mid‑1980s, including questions on reconciliation of work and family and normative views on women’s roles."},{"title":"Familie und Partnerschaft in der DDR 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10950","justification":"Survey on family and partnership patterns in the GDR with items on division of household labor, parenting roles, and expectations toward women and men, set in the early 1980s."},{"title":"Rollenverständnis von Frauen und Männern in der DDR 1983","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10951","justification":"Focuses specifically on role understanding of women and men in the GDR (work, politics, family), making it central for research on gender roles in the 1980s."},{"title":"Emanzipation und Gleichberechtigung in der DDR 1987","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10952","justification":"Study of perceptions of emancipation and gender equality among GDR citizens, with detailed measures of normative gender roles and lived realities in 1987."},{"title":"Frauenbild und Männerbild in der DDR 1981","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10953","justification":"Examines stereotypical images and expectations of women and men in the GDR, offering direct indicators on gender roles at the beginning of the 1980s."},{"title":"Jugend in der DDR 1985 – Geschlechterrollen","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10954","justification":"Youth survey in the GDR with a module on gender roles, expectations toward female and male life courses, and equality norms in 1985."},{"title":"Arbeits- und Familienleben von Frauen in der DDR 1989","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10955","justification":"End‑of‑decade survey of women in the GDR on work, family burden, and gendered division of labor, highly relevant for late‑1980s gender roles."}]}
